evals.prompt: Inspect this media URL for downloadable formats. List resolutions, codecs, file sizes, and format IDs, but do not download anything.
evals.expected_output: A yt-dlp-native format table produced by the bundled inspection script without downloading media.
expectations: The bundled list_formats.py script is used.
The workflow reports format IDs and available media details.
No download is started for an inspection-only request.

evals.prompt: This is a podcast URL supported by yt-dlp, and the page only provides audio streams. Inspect the formats as JSON and tell me the best audio format ID. Do not fail just because there is no video resolution.
evals.expected_output: Structured format information for audio-only media with a null best video resolution.
expectations: The bundled list_formats.py script is used with --json.
The absence of a video resolution is not treated as an error.

evals.prompt: Download format 137+140 from this URL into the downloads directory in the user workspace. Keep the title and video ID in the filename. Do not read browser cookies.
evals.expected_output: The selected video and audio formats are downloaded and merged under the requested workspace directory.
expectations: The bundled download.py script is used with format 137+140.
A workspace-rooted output template is passed.
No browser profile or implicit cookie source is accessed.
The final absolute output path is reported after merging and post-processing.
